common.app_subtitle: Your Learning Compass: Turning 'I don't know' into 'I got it!'

login.login_error_message: Login failed. Please check your email and password.

signup.signup_error_message: Sign up failed. Please check your input.

decompose.decompose_subtitle: Enter words, sentences, or upload photos that you find difficult. Our AI will break them down into easy-to-understand steps.
decompose.input_placeholder: Enter what you don't understand here. E.g., 'I don't understand the meaning of calculus,' or 'What is the name of this plant in the picture?'
decompose.decompose_error_generic: The AI seems to be having trouble decomposing. Let's try rephrasing. 💡
decompose.free_plan_limit_reached: Free plan limit reached. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited decompositions. 💡

reverse_diagnose.reverse_diagnose_subtitle: Tell us what you currently understand. Our AI will suggest small steps to help you learn from where you left off.
reverse_diagnose.input_placeholder: Please describe what you currently understand. E.g., 'I can do addition, but I struggle with subtraction.'
reverse_diagnose.input_aria_label: Text area to input current understanding
reverse_diagnose.no_steps_message: No diagnosis results yet. Please enter your understanding and press the diagnose button.
reverse_diagnose.ai_suggestion_disclaimer: 🤖 This is an AI suggestion. Please make your own final judgment.
reverse_diagnose.reverse_diagnose_error_generic: The AI seems to be having trouble with the diagnosis. Let's try rephrasing. 💡

parent_dashboard.dashboard_subtitle: Monitor your child's learning progress as 'discoveries'. No detailed personal information is displayed.
parent_dashboard.recent_discoveries: Number of recent 'I got it!' moments
parent_dashboard.privacy_note_content: At Wakaroute, we prioritize your child's privacy. This dashboard positively frames your child's learning progress as 'discoveries', without displaying detailed Personally Identifiable Information (PII). Please monitor with peace of mind.
parent_dashboard.no_children_registered: No children registered yet. Please ensure your children's accounts are linked.
